name: next-title-trim-count
description: タイトル・見出しブロックに文字数制限を追加するWordPressプラグイン

scripts.zip: npm run build && cd .. && zip -r next-title-trim-count.zip next-Title-TrimCount -x 'next-Title-TrimCount/node_modules/*' -x 'next-Title-TrimCount/src/*' -x 'next-Title-TrimCount/package.json' -x 'next-Title-TrimCount/package-lock.json' -x 'next-Title-TrimCount/.git/*' -x 'next-Title-TrimCount/.gitignore' -x 'next-Title-TrimCount/.DS_Store' && echo 'Created: ../next-title-trim-count.zip'
